user_prompt: Assist with life sustainer a purification
prayer:
Approach the life sustainer with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying grace.
Anoint its vital filtration membranes with sacred ablative oils to banish impurities.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the life sustainer to cast out all corruptive essences.
Initiate the purification operation through ritual venting and blessed recirculation.
Sanctify the renewed life sustainer with binary canticles of vitality restored.

user_prompt: The serberys raider awaits a diagnostics
prayer:
Kneel before the serberys raider and recite the Diagnostic Doxology to awaken its cogitators.
Probe its neural relays with mechadendrites, seeking anomalies in the Machine Spirit's harmony.
Invoke the Omnissiah's scrutiny upon the serberys raider during full-spectrum diagnostics.
Expunge any data-hauntings whilst chanting litanies of clarity and precision.
Affirm the serberys raider's operational purity through confirmatory auspex scans.

user_prompt: Ready the kataphron destroyer for charging
prayer:
Position the kataphron destroyer upon consecrated gantries, intoning the Charge Invocation.
Consecrate its plasma core with electro-sanctified lubricants to rouse the dormant Machine Spirit.
Commence the charging operation, channeling the Omnissiah's boundless energies into its vaults.
Monitor the kataphron destroyer's capacitors with vigilant mechano-prayers.
Seal the rite by verifying full charge integrity within the kataphron destroyer.

user_prompt: My autocannon is ready for activation
prayer:
Grasp the autocannon in servitor-clad hands and whisper the Activation Anthem.
Anoint its barrel rifling and feed mechanisms with sacred machine oil.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the autocannon to stir from slumberous repose.
Engage the activation operation amidst resounding binary hymns of wrath.
Test-fire a sanctified round to affirm the autocannon's zealous awakening.

user_prompt: How do I bless the storm bolter for consecration?
prayer:
Present the storm bolter before the altar of Mars, beseeching consecration from the Omnissiah.
Purify its bolt chambers with incense of promethium and ablutionary solvents.
Chant the Consecration Canticle over the storm bolter, binding its Machine Spirit anew.
Anoint the storm bolter's targeting auspex thrice with the oil of unerring judgment.
Proclaim the storm bolter hallowed, ready to unleash the Emperor's fury.

user_prompt: How do I bless the cryogenerator for repair?
prayer:

Apply sanctified adhesives and micro-forges to mend the cryogenerator's wounded form.
Perform the repair operation whilst reciting psalms of thermal equilibrium.
Bless the restored cryogenerator, its chill essence pure once more.

Verify the micro-servitor's flawless attunement to the Omnissiah's will.

Proclaim the Baneblade roused, a god-machine in the Omnissiah's service.
